activities.name: Oak Hill with Leo
activities.description: last round before it gets too cold. played oak hill with Leo. lost 3 balls lol

activities.name: Charles River Paddle
activities.description: gorgeous fall morning on the Charles. the foliage is insane right now 🍂

activities.name: First Winter Swim
activities.description: first pool swim of the season. legs felt heavy but got through it

activities.name: Morning Swim — Intervals
activities.description: solid session. 100m repeats @1:45. getting the groove back

activities.name: Morning Swim
activities.description: good morning session. hit all my 100m intervals under 1:50

activities.name: Morning Swim
activities.description: cold outside, warm pool. love winter swimming

activities.name: Morning Swim — 2k!
activities.description: 2k!! new distance PR for the winter. feeling strong

activities.name: Back in the Pool
activities.description: first swim in 5 days. felt like starting over but glad to be back

activities.name: Spring Kayak Opener 🛶
activities.description: first paddle of the season!! legs were shaky getting in but once ur on the water its all good. charles was glassy this morning

activities.name: Spring Golf is BACK
activities.description: SPRING IS HERE. first round of the year, rusty but so happy to be back out
